info.name: Komiku API
info.description:
This collection contains the API endpoints for the Komiku application. It is organized around the main resources of the system, including users, categories, comics, chapters, chapter pages, comments, replies, and ratings.

The collection supports common application workflows such as user registration and login, content management, comic browsing, chapter and page retrieval, and community interactions through comments, replies, and ratings. It also includes a dedicated end-to-end section for testing complete multi-step scenarios across the API.

Overall, this collection is intended to help with development, manual testing, and validation of the full Komiku backend workflow from authentication to content and interaction management.
